summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GlobalAgri Commodities website major update. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI 95% functional with excellent integration. Main issue: database missing 2 new jobs and 2 new insights from seed data.

data_issues.impact: Job detail pages return 404, careers page shows incomplete listings
Insight detail pages return 404, insights page shows incomplete listings

ui_bugs.issue: Name field selector not optimal (form still works with validation)
ui_bugs.selector: input[name='name'] not found, but form validation works

integration_issues.issue: Shows 0 job cards (but individual job pages work when accessed directly)
Shows 0 insight cards (but individual insight pages work when accessed directly)

passed_tests: All backend API endpoints (17/17 tests passed)
Homepage loads with all required sections
Hero carousel with 3 slides and navigation
Who We Serve icon grid (6 market segments)
Latest Market Insights section (dynamically loads 3 articles from API)
Multi-column footer with all required sections
Mega dropdown menus for About and Commodities
Job detail pages for existing jobs
Insight detail pages for existing insights
action_item_for_main_agent: Database needs to be reseeded with complete data set. The seed_data.py contains 8 insights and 6 jobs, but database only has 6 insights and 4 jobs. Missing: oilseeds-trader-singapore, compliance-officer-geneva jobs and global-corn-trade-flows-shifting, building-resilient-food-supply-chains insights. Backend may need restart after reseeding.
